chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D-2919 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on office objection For orders on M.A No.15765/16 For katcha peshi 01-11-2017. Mr. Bhagwandas Bheel, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, learned A.A.G = The petitioners claim to be appointed as Primary School Teacher, Junior School Teacher & Oriental Teacher in Education department at district Tharparkar. They have filed this petition for release of their salaries. The respondent No.1 and 4 have filed comments and have questioned the genuineness of the appointments of the petitioners. Be that as it may, we are of the view that, since the petitioners are claiming to be Civil Servants, this petition, in which they are seeking release of their salaries, would not be maintainable. The issue of salary comes within the terms and condition of service, therefore, the jurisdiction of this court would be barred under Article 212 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. For the grievance agitated before us, the petitioners have to approach the Service Tribunal. In view of above, this petition is dismissed; however, the petitioners if advised, may approach the proper forum for redressal of their grievances, if any. JUDGE JUDGE Fahad Memon
